info.description: This is a REST API for managing a tires and rims store/warehouse.
info.title: Tires Shop CRM API

get.description: Get audit logs with optional filtering by entity, action, user and date range.
Returns a paginated list of admin notifications.

post.description: Marks an admin notification as read.

get.description: Get all users with optional filtering.

post.description: Create new worker by Telegram ID or promote existing user by Username/Phone.

put.description: Promote or demote a user (e.g. BUYER -> STAFF).

post.description: Validates Telegram initData and returns a JWT token.

get.description: Get active lots. Purchase price and archive data are hidden.
Get a paginated list of orders placed by the current user.

post.description: Place a new order with customer details and tire items.

get.description: Calculates total revenue, COGS, and profit based on DONE orders.
Get lots including sensitive financial data and archives.

post.description: Add a new lot to the inventory.

delete.description: Removes the image from MinIO using its public URL.

parameters.description: Public URL of the photo to delete
parameters.name: request

post.description: Compresses the image to JPEG, uploads to MinIO, and returns the public URL.

200.description: Returns the public URL of the uploaded image

put.description: Update details of an existing lot.

get.description: Generates and returns a PNG image of a QR code containing the Lot ID.
Get a paginated list of orders, filterable by status or customer.

parameters.description: Search by customer name or phone
parameters.name: customer

post.description: Send a Telegram bot message to the customer tied to the order via customer_telegram_id.

get.description: Returns inbound and outbound Telegram messages linked to the order.

put.description: Change the status of an existing order (e.g., NEW, PREPAYMENT, DONE, CANCELLED).

post.description: Moves stock from one warehouse to another (Status: IN_TRANSIT).
Receives the stock at the destination warehouse (Status: ACCEPTED).
Cancels an IN_TRANSIT transfer and refunds stock.

telegram_id.description: Optional if searching by other fields

warehouse_id.description: Optional: Move lot to another warehouse (inventory implication?)
